subscription.reason: Requires a Personal Access Token (PAT) with read:user scope — default GITHUB_TOKEN does not include this scope. See API-LIMITATIONS.md.

orgMetrics.reason: Requires manage_billing:copilot scope (org admin only). See API-LIMITATIONS.md.

codespaces.reason: Requires a Personal Access Token (PAT) with codespace scope — default GITHUB_TOKEN does not include this scope. See API-LIMITATIONS.md.

projects.reason: Requires a Personal Access Token (PAT) with read:project scope — default GITHUB_TOKEN does not include this scope. See API-LIMITATIONS.md.
